title: Day 07 Quiz — Week 1 Review
description: Cumulative quiz across JSX, state, forms, lists, useEffect, routing, and custom hooks before certifying Week 1 complete.

questions.prompt: Week 1 machine coding expects you to build which set of features in 90 minutes?

options.text: Login page, dashboard, sidebar, and navbar

questions.explanation: Day 07 consolidates Week 1: auth-style login UI plus routed dashboard shell.

questions.prompt: Which topics are fair game in Week 1 machine coding? Select all that apply.
questions.explanation: Redux is Week 3. Custom hooks from Day 06 are also fair if you built them this week.

questions.prompt: During the machine coding round you may use AI assistants and copy-paste from previous projects.
questions.explanation: Day 07 rules: no AI, no Google, no copy-paste — only official docs. Simulates interview conditions.

questions.prompt: Best order to build under time pressure?

options.text: Polish CSS first, then routing, then forms last
Scaffold routes and layout shell, login form, then wire navigation and minimal styles
Write all TypeScript types for Week 4 first

questions.explanation: Interview strategy: working skeleton first — layout + routes + login — then iterate. Polish if time remains.

questions.prompt: Controlled login inputs use {{blank1}} and {{blank2}}; dashboard child pages render in {{blank3}}.
questions.explanation: Week 1 patterns combined: Day 02 forms + Day 05 routing.

questions.prompt: Complete the hook for Week 1 debounced search (Day 06).
questions.explanation: useDebounce from Day 06 — optional in machine round but good to remember.

questions.prompt: You have 20 minutes left and login works but dashboard is empty. Highest priority?

options.text: Sidebar links + Outlet + one dashboard page with placeholder content

questions.explanation: Demonstrate routing and layout — core Week 1 deliverable. Placeholder content is acceptable under time pressure.

questions.prompt: After machine coding, how do you identify weak areas for Week 2?
questions.sampleAnswer: Note where I hesitated — routing config, useEffect deps, form validation. Compare against definition of done. Re-read those day lessons and rebuild the weak slice without looking at solutions.
questions.explanation: Day 07 is assessment plus self-directed review.

questions.prompt: What renders if route path is * in a catch-all 404 route?
questions.explanation: Catch-all matches unknown URLs — Week 1 Day 05 pattern.

questions.prompt: Official docs are allowed during machine coding because:

options.text: Interviewers expect you to know syntax by heart only
Real engineers look up API details — understanding matters more than memorizing Router API
Stack Overflow is the same as official docs

questions.explanation: Understanding beats memorization. Official React and Router docs clarify API — not tutorials with full app code.
